programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: After moving 42 times, an attorney is settling in Long Beach, NY. She wants a place with an updated kitchen to share with her mum and adult son.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: An assistant principal and a teacher are moving to the seaside town of Long Beach, NY. They want to find a home close to the beach.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple from Colorado want to move their blended family from the Rocky Mountains to Orange Beach, Alabama. Will they find their dream home?

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple from Missouri looks for a two-bedroom home with a pool, space for a boat and views. Can they get all those things without breaking the bank?

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple won $1 million on a scratch card and decide to purchase a retirement home in North Carolina. David Bromstad shows them a selection of properties.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple won $1 million on a wedding gift scratch card. They look for a home with old-fashioned charm and plenty of space in Worcester, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A busy couple has always loved taking trips to the tranquil shores of Oak Island. Realizing life is short, they want to permanently move to the beach.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Married doctors have returned to Chicago to buy their first home together. One of them is obsessed with finding a place with wow factor.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A first-time buyer in Boston brings her boyfriend, who's a contractor, along on the search for a home she can live in with her sister.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Garden Grove, California, that is in need of a major makeover. But will this add or subtract from their profits?

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: After spending most of their lives at sea, a couple takes their kids to Aquidneck Island in Narragansett Bay hoping to find a home close to the beach.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple seeks their oasis with a home on South Padre Island in Texas where they can ditch their hectic lifestyle for relaxation and adventure.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple searches for a waterfront home with beautiful ocean views that's big enough for them and their 11-year-old son in Cancun, Mexico.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After years of RV Florida vacations, a couple is ready for a full-time home on Flagler Beach. They both want a place that's right on the beach.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Tyra Banks is "Smize"ing her way through a renovation for a best friend from junior high, showing off her design chops with Jonathan and Drew's help.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A sibling who inherited money from his late brother enlists David Bromstad to find a stunning home with a pool in the Coachella Valley.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: David helps a woman honour the memory of her late parents by finding a generational vacation home to purchase on the Emerald Coast.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A stargazing couple won $3.5 million in the Texas lottery! Now, David is helping them find a dream home just outside of Lubbock, Texas.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After winning $1 million, a couple wants to find a home outside their tiny town of Wilmot, Ohio, that has a big yard for their grandson and dogs to play in.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: A daughter asks Leslie and Lyndsay to take over her mother's rambler after it sat on the market for three months. They give the home a calming, coastal vibe.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Contractor Jeff's sister and brother-in-law need to sell their split-level home. Leslie and Lyndsay transform this bland property into a French country cottage.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: The guys purchase a dilapidated home and turn it into a Nordic paradise. After some setbacks, the house becomes one of their most beautiful.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith and Evan tackle a renovation to create their own dream home in the heart of Detroit. With a few setbacks, the team dreams up a lofty plan.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: After years on the road as traveling medical professionals, a couple trades scrubs for sunsets in Panama City Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Cheap A$$ Beach Houses
programme.desc: With their daughter as their realtor, empty nesters hunt for a home on the sun-soaked beaches of Gulf Shores, Alabama.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny surprise a family in Tulsa with a 24-hour makeover and full home refresh for their young daughter battling cancer.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Colorado Mountain House
programme.desc: Chip and Jo race to finish their Colorado fixer as their daughter heads off to college. Construction and styling conclude before the big reveal.

programme.title: Flipping 101 with Tarek El Moussa
programme.desc: A first-time flipper is determined to learn the business from the ground up but problems start piling up before demo even begins. Tarek steps in to help.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab
programme.desc: Alison takes an opportunity to build in a new area of Chicago. While the project goes smoothly, cracks continue to spread in her partnership with Donovan.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Tyra Banks is "Smize"ing her way through a renovation for a best friend from junior high, showing off her design chops with Jonathan and Drew's help.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: After moving 42 times, an attorney is settling in Long Beach, NY. She wants a place with an updated kitchen to share with her mum and adult son.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: An assistant principal and a teacher are moving to the seaside town of Long Beach, NY. They want to find a home close to the beach.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Sisters look for a two-family home in Gulf Shores, Alabama. One sister wants a turnkey home, the other is more budget-focused.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: A couple searches for a waterfront house for their three teens in Florida. She wants great views, but he's more focused on the home's interior.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A young professional is buying her first place in Long Beach, NY. She grew up visiting the area with her family and wants a condo with a pool and gym.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A newlywed military couple is looking for a house close to the Whidbey Island naval base. They want a place with a garage and a yard for their dogs.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple searches for a waterfront home with beautiful ocean views that's big enough for them and their 11-year-old son in Cancun, Mexico.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: A couple relocates from Vancouver to a waterfront home in Guanacaste, Costa Rica. He wants a modern place near town, she prefers a Spanish style.
